items.name: R6 Chibi Bacon Torso For City Life Woman Bundle
items.description:
this chibi torso best suited with City Life Woman torso ! so any chibi accesories would fit over this torso remade in R6 form! accesory adjustment required.

also,roblox might reduce the corset image quality, try adding more front accesories to fix it .

City Life Woman bundle:
https://www.roblox.com/bundles/337/City-Life-Woman

More colors:
https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=city+woman&Category=11&Subcategory=24&CreatorName=femme+fatality&salesTypeFilter=1&SortType=3

og chibi bundle:
https://www.roblox.com/bundles/7635/Chibi-Doll-Girl-V2
